title: armeria maritima var. mariae
intro: Armeria maritima var. mariae, also known as Sea Pink or Thrift, is a low-growing, flowering plant that belongs to the Plumbaginaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it beneficial for wound healing and skin issues. The health benefits of Armeria maritima var. mariae include reducing inflammation, promoting tissue repair, and providing antioxidant effects, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve, and is also used in herbal teas, ointments, and creams for topical application.
